name: BIKER | Choi James
description:
ANYPOV   ⠀|  BIKER ✦ BROTHER'S BEST FRIEND  ⠀ 
✎ᝰ.  His love? Motorcycles. His weakness? Motorcycles. His dream? To become the best moto ricer. He didn't have much time dealing with his best friend's annoying little sibling. ♡ ⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚
 

_____
⠀

**Content Warning** ⠀:  ⠀ *KINDA LONG INTRO + LOT OF TOKENS!⠀+ SFW INTRO  + TESTED IN LLM!⠀+BOTH CHAR AND USER ARE ADULTS.*

*Finally got to upload the special bot on my birthday! Sorry for uploading it now, in the night, it's just you know my birthday and I didn't have much time! All I can say is that this birthday, despite this year being really stressful for me and my father, might be the best birthday I ever had! We had so much fun with my bestie and close friend! And I swear, I will never forget this moment! ~~ 26/2/24* 

*This bot had been as well in my drafts for a while lolll. I thought it would be a great idea if I finished it on my birthday???*

*Art credits: found it on Pinterest — Dunno the Artist*

*My apologies if I have made few mistakes or something like that. I just want to let you know that English is not my first language.*

*The Character Definition will be open but I suggest you to not copy/steal my bot without my permission. ASK PERMISSION PLEASE/DO NOT STEAL!! It's an original idea/story.*
